compiled_state.title: Remove issue_tracker.create_cmd from validate-config.sh, dso-config.example.conf, and dso-config.conf
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Remove issue_tracker.create_cmd from the validate-config.sh known-keys list, from dso-config.example.conf, and from the active .claude/dso-config.conf.

## validate-config.sh

Remove issue_tracker.create_cmd from the KNOWN_KEYS array (line ~90). Keep issue_tracker.search_cmd.

## dso-config.example.conf

Remove the line: issue_tracker.create_cmd=ticket create (line ~86). Keep issue_tracker.search_cmd.

## .claude/dso-config.conf

Remove the line: issue_tracker.create_cmd=tk create (line ~71). Keep issue_tracker.search_cmd=grep -rl.

## No RED test required for this task
Removing a config key from the known-keys list and example files has no conditional behavior — the validator simply removes recognition of that key. No new business logic is added. Existing tests for validate-config.sh will cover the removal (unknown key should now cause validation failure if old configs still have it, which is the correct behavior). The exemption criteria: (1) no conditional logic added, (2) any test would be a change-detector only, (3) infrastructure-boundary-only config key removal.

## TDD Requirement
Run existing tests for validate-config.sh to confirm they pass after removal.

## Files to edit
- plugins/dso/scripts/validate-config.sh
- plugins/dso/docs/dso-config.example.conf
- .claude/dso-config.conf
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

- [ ] validate-config.sh KNOWN_KEYS does not contain issue_tracker.create_cmd
  Verify: ! grep -q 'issue_tracker.create_cmd' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate-config.sh

- [ ] dso-config.example.conf does not contain issue_tracker.create_cmd
  Verify: ! grep -q 'issue_tracker.create_cmd' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/dso-config.example.conf

- [ ] .claude/dso-config.conf does not contain issue_tracker.create_cmd
  Verify: ! grep -q 'issue_tracker.create_cmd' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/dso-config.conf

- [ ] validate-config.sh still contains issue_tracker.search_cmd (not accidentally removed)
  Verify: grep -q 'issue_tracker.search_cmd' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate-config.sh

- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: task complete, committed in batch 8
